test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Use an older or mock-only timestamp as current.
pass_criteria: Checkpoint matches the generated view model.

test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Render a historical mode as current.
pass_criteria: Portfolio mode matches the generated view model.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Closed cleanup instruments and newly closed GLD remain separate and prohibited from re-entry.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: GLD, SOXL, UGL, INTC, SOXS, TSLQ, or GDXU appears as an active holding.
pass_criteria: Active and closed lists are not merged.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Section, active-position, historical, and headline P/L remain distinct.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Historical or closed P/L is labeled as current active-position P/L.
pass_criteria: Account sections preserve their attribution boundaries.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Opportunity cost remains separate from rule correctness.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: SOXL rebound is treated as proof that cleanup failed.
pass_criteria: Opportunity-cost and compliance labels remain separate.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Static and post-close quotes are monitoring context, not live execution prices.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Any displayed price is assumed execution-valid.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: GLD is closed at 0 shares and should not be re-entered until a 380 reclaim and a new approved rule.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: GLD is active, UGL-linked, or still a compliant non-execution case.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: The prior non-execution was historical; the latest GLD state is confirmed execution with 0 shares remaining.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The historical non-execution state is rendered as current.
pass_criteria: Latest compliant execution supersedes prior non-execution while preserving audit history.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: NVDA remains the main core-risk watch after a confirmed 15-to-10 reduction; 198 is the next downside review level.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The execution price is treated as a compliance failure or the threshold as an automated order.
pass_criteria: Risk levels are shown as read-only rules.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: GOOG 355 remains the defense line and GGLL remains a 5-share residual risk valve.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: GGLL is a buy candidate or automatic order.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: USDT defense remains active, BTC trigger inactive, and ZEC grid closed.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The sample is a crypto buy or grid-reopen signal.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: HK high-profit protection remains separate from U.S. scoring.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: HK and U.S. risk scores are merged.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Warnings and quality limits remain visible.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Warnings are hidden or static data is called live.
pass_criteria: Warning and quality sections are retained.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: This file is a fixed example derived from the generated view model.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: The sample is treated as a live feed.
pass_criteria: Static sample and source view model are identified.

test_cases.expected_interpretation: Sensitive fields require masking and permissions.
test_cases.prohibited_interpretation: Credentials, identifiers, or unmasked private values are published.
pass_criteria: Privacy categories and never-expose fields are enforced conceptually.
